Name: 3" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings

Name: Corner Flushers
Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.

Name: MudRunner Pro® Tool Case
Description: Protect your investment with this soft-sided protective case designed exclusively for the MudRunner® and MudRunner Pro®.

Name: MudRunner® Pro Extension
Description: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. The New MudRunner® Pro Extension adds up to 20% more overall length to the MudRunner® Pro when installed. Due to the installment process, the extension becomes the "on/off" twisting lever for the tool.

Name: MudRunner® Pro
Description: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision control and minimal effort. The new MudRunner® Pro offers a tremendous update in the efficiency of finishing corners in drywall. The tool offers more versatility when needed in adjustment to length, both integrated and with the MRX01TT extension (sold separately). The new MudRunner® Pro also offers a 20% increase in piston strength for greater compound application. Name: 12" Compound Roller Frame
Description: TapeTech 12" Roller Cage CCAGE12 &nbsp; TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. &nbsp; Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

TapeTech Premium Pool Trowels feature two rounded ends, ideal to generate a smooth appearance on curved or flat surfaces, minimizing the number of lines or sweep marks that can occur with square-edged trowels. This makes them a great choice for finishing Pools, Drywall, Plaster, Stucco, Concrete and EIFS.

Name: 16" x 5" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel - ProSoft Grip
Description: TapeTech Premium Finishing Trowels are the highest quality finishing trowels on the market. The 0.65 mm blade thickness makes these finishing trowels the workhorse of your tool kit and the perfect starting point towards the perfect finish of drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, epoxy and micro-cements. The triple-hardened European stainless steel blades ensure maximum performance, and the ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue. TapeTech Premium Finishing Trowels provide the ultimate combination of performance, flexibility and durability, resulting in long life and a perfect finish every time.

Name: 18" x 4.3" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel
Description: TapeTech Premium MAXFLEXX finishing trowels provide the highest amount of flexibility and control, producing the ultimate finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, concrete, epoxy and micro-cement. Crafted using 0.3 mm European triple-hardened gold stainless steel, these trowels ensure maximum performance and long life. The ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue. MAX-FLEXX finishing trowels are the perfect tool for the final coat. The blades on the TapeTech MAXFLEXX finishing trowels are attached to the handle mount using a special technology that robotically and precisely welds the rivets to the blade surface. These superior quality stainless steel rivets are then pressed into the handle mount, resulting in the strongest trowels available. Other brands use two-sided tape to attach the blade to the mount.

Name: 18" x 4.7" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel
Description: TapeTech Premium MIDFLEXX finishing trowels produce a superior finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, concrete, epoxy and micro-cement due to the added flexibility of the blade compared to standard trowels. Name: EEX275135 2.75" 135 Outside Corner Edger
Description: TapeTech Outside Corner Edgers for 135o Corners are designed to produce smooth, uniform outside corners at 45° wall junctures for EIFS, Stucco, Plaster, Concrete and other materials. Handcrafted from 0.65mm stainless steel, TapeTech corner edgers are robust enough to efficiently create perfect results in thick materials. Custom wood handles are ergonomic for all-day use and the unique TapeTech black and gold design helps distinguish your tools from others on the jobsite. Available in three sizes for ultimate versatility in nearly every situation.

Name: 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame
Description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2" compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: 2" Premium Stainless Steel Joint Knife
Description: TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle?s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel while Stainless Steel blades maximize rust resistance. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. Features: Premium Stainless Steel Blade Resists Corrosion and Cleans Up Fast Precision Grind Provides Perfect Flex and Finish Oversized, Tapered, Soft-Grip Handle Provides Optimal Control and Comfort Alloy Metal Hammer End Sets Protruding Fasteners, Adjusts Installation Flaws and Protects Against Damage From Drops. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. &nbsp; Key Features: Ideal Length: The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 Support Handle for TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers extends from 44” – 79”, the most versatile range of extension handles for compound rollers. Robust but Lightweight: You don’t want unnecessary weight when you have a roller full of joint compound. The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 is the perfect balance of light weight and robust materials to make you as efficient as possible. Twist and Go: Our simple twist-lock design allows you to quickly make adjustments on the fly, without worrying about mechanical extension failures taking you and your project down. Lock and Load: Our CROLLHAN2 Support Handle quickly attaches to our range of four premium drywall joint compound roller frames and rollers. Frames and rollers are available in 2-inch, 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch. Stores Easily: CROLLHAN2 features a hanger at the end of the handle so you can easily hang the handle in your shop, vehicle or on the jobsite, keeping it from constantly falling to the floor when not in use.

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump was designed in conjunction with Graco specifically to pump joint compound for high production drywall finishing applications. The Endurance Pump, MaxPower Motor and Advantage Drive System combine to create the most rugged and reliable pump on the market. The internal hopper filter maximizes material usage by allowing joint compound collected during the wipe down process to be re-used without fear of debris entering the pump. The 25 gallon hopper can be used as a tool wash station and includes an air tight lid so compound can be preserved for next day use. With the optional CTFIL, standard ATF tools can be filled while the continuous flow tools are in use. Also Available: CTEPMP: CFS Pump - Europe (230V / 50 Hz). Available through European Distributors and Dealers only. CTAPMP: CFS Pump - Australia (230V / 50 Hz) with 242005 adapter. Available through Australian and New Zealand Distributors and Dealers only. CTUPMP: CFS Pump - UK (110V). Available through UK Distributors and Dealers only.

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound. &nbsp; Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease. &nbsp; Versatile Application &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments. &nbsp; Conclusion &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Name: Mobile Wash Station

The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Features: Improved pump that only circulates while the trigger is being operated, extending the life of the pump and providing twice the cleaning power of the original pump Improved spray hose &amp; nozzle with more control over pressure and directional spray Now includes Accessory Kit (MWS-ACC) with basket, drain riser, and nozzle brush to dry your tools, keep compound out of your water bucket, and remove stubborn compound Locking Wheel Kit – MWS01-LW also included lets you easily move your Mobile Wash Station around and lock when needed

Name: MWS Accessory Kit

The basket can be hung at various locations on the wash basin. Nozzle Brush – The brush simply snaps onto the end of the spray nozzle. When used in combination with the spray nozzle, the new brush helps remove stubborn compound faster. The brush also acts as a splash shield against over spray. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer.
